title: Flea Treatment in Greenpoint, Brooklyn | $350 – $650 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment in Greenpoint, Brooklyn starting at $350. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and apartments. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Greenpoint home or apartment? Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Greenpoint, Brooklyn, with pricing ranging from $350 to $650 depending on the size of your space and severity of the infestation. Our experienced technicians use safe, EPA-approved treatments to eliminate fleas at all life stages and protect your family and pets.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Greenpoint residents for years with fast, reliable flea extermination services. We understand the unique challenges of treating fleas in Brooklyn's mix of historic brownstones, modern condos, and multi-family buildings, and we offer same-day appointments and follow-up treatments to ensure complete elimination.
localContext: Greenpoint's tree-lined streets, proximity to McCarren Park, and pet-friendly community make it a wonderful neighborhood, but these same factors can contribute to flea problems in local homes and apartments. Whether you live in one of the charming pre-war buildings near Manhattan Avenue or a newer development along the waterfront, our team knows how to effectively treat flea infestations in all of Greenpoint's diverse housing types.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Greenpoint?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatment services in Greenpoint range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home or apartment and the severity of the infestation. We provide free quotes and can typically give you an accurate estimate over the phone based on your square footage and specific situation.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours of treatment. However, complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks as eggs hatch and are exposed to the treatment. We include a follow-up visit in our service to ensure all fleas are eliminated at every life stage.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We ask that you keep pets and children out of treated areas for 2-4 hours while the treatment dries, after which they can safely return. We'll provide you with specific instructions during your appointment.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my Greenpoint apartment before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, preparation is important for effective treatment. We recommend vacuuming thoroughly, washing all pet bedding and linens, and removing pets during treatment. If you have a multi-unit building in Greenpoint, we may also recommend coordinating with neighbors to prevent re-infestation. We'll provide a complete preparation checklist when you book your appointment.
